splash.body: So you think you got the chops to use the Sales Research Tools. Alright, hepcat. Let’s see if you’re hep to jive! If you fail, you won't be able to keep going with the School of Jazz. But don't fret! You can use your notes and any resources you want, so take your time! In fact, we strongly recommend it!

conclusion.body: Good job, slick! Knew you could do it!

The John Soultrain

Also known as “Soul Train in the Membrane,” this jazz saxophonist and composer helped pioneer the use of modes in jazz and was later at the forefront of the “Soul Train” dance.

questions.text: This sales research tool helps you figure out how many MUVs Pandora has for our third party audience segments. Examples include Midsize Car Intenders, Savvy Investors and Non Glade Air Freshening Shoppers (for real).

feedback.title: You got it!
feedback.body: The Third Party Audience Segmentation helps us to figure out the monthly unique visitors within specific audience segmentations.

feedback.title: Sounds like you need some practice!
feedback.body: Maybe practice going up and down the scales (or through these modules) again?

feedback.title: Uh-Oh.
feedback.body: Sounds like you’re not in sync with your bandmates!

feedback.title: Screech!
feedback.body: Think you hit a sour note there.

questions.text: This sales research tool helps you report key engagement metrics by demo and DMA. Examples include thumbs, stations created, station shares and time spent listening.

feedback.title: You’re in the groove now, Slick!
feedback.body: The User Engagement tool helps you pull thumbs, stations created, station shares and time spent listening by demographic and DMA.

feedback.title: Uh-oh.

feedback.title: Are we in the same key?
feedback.body: Because we’re playing chromatic, and it sounds like you’re just in the minors.

questions.text: This external tool helps connect media consumption with buying behaviors by providing insights into a Website’s audience profile. It uses a measurement known as an index score.

feedback.title: Those drums are getting people to jive!
feedback.body: Nielsen Scarborough is an external resource that helps us provide insights on an audience segment’s buying behaviors using an index score.

feedback.title: Yikes.
feedback.body: Missed a beat there, huh, Slick?

feedback.body: Are you playing the same song as everyone else?
